title: alchemilla contractilis
intro: Alchemilla contractilis, also known as Alpine lady's mantle, is a flowering plant species in the genus Alchemilla, characterized by its delicate white flowers and small, oval-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Alchemilla contractilis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, among other health benefits. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla contractilis can be consumed as tea, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
